title: Old Potion Colors
description: Restores the old familiar potion colors from Minecraft 1.19.3 and below!
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

# Old Potion Colors

## About
- Color changes also extend to **tipped arrows** & **potion particles**.
- This pack is an **overlay**. Place it **above** your other resource packs to ensure it works correctly.

## Compatibility
This pack is designed to be compatible with **ANY** mod that supports custom colors, including:
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
- [Vanadium](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanadium)
- [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic)

## Credit
The color data used to restore the old potion colors is sourced from [the official Minecraft Wiki comparison table](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Effect_colors/Java_Edition_potion_color_changes_in_1.19.4).

## Notes
- Feel free to use this resource pack anywhere, but credit would be appreciated!
